# context-md Project Context

> Context for the context-md project — specification, design rationale, and tool usage

## Instructions

This is the context-md project itself — it defines a standard for organizing LLM context
using modular Markdown files.

If you are helping develop or extend this project, use the files below to understand
its design goals, specification, and tooling. Read descriptions to decide what you need;
fetch only what is relevant to your current task.
